first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns is substantively the same. The minor differences in wording ("Extensive experience" vs. "Deep expertise") are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the assessment of the candidate's skills based on the change in location from Western cities to Kenya.
